tooltip.nomadic_herbs.grinder.tooltip: Grinds plants into pastes or powders.
tooltip.nomadic_herbs.pouch.tooltip: A small, light pouch that can hold water when filled.
tooltip.nomadic_herbs.water_pouch.toolti: A small, light pouch holding a few sips of water.
tooltip.nomadic_herbs.peyote.tooltip: Can be ground into a healing paste with a Grinder.
tooltip.nomadic_herbs.peyote_paste.toolt: Treats basic open wounds and infections.
tooltip.nomadic_herbs.rosemary.tooltip: Eaten to ease muscle discomfort and easier digestion.
tooltip.nomadic_herbs.cilantro.tooltip: Relieves stomach pains and general aches.
tooltip.nomadic_herbs.water_hyssop.toolt: Lowers stress levels and anxiety, whilst also improving digestion.
tooltip.nomadic_herbs.squirreltail.toolt: Reduces fever and soothes rashes or burning sensations.
